This [[Minigames|Minigame]] is [[Rare Rent]] from [[Peter Jr.]].

Questions do not have to be answered correctly ''in the same game'' to count for reward credit.

Questions can be asked in any order.

{| class="wikitable"
!Question
!Answer

|-
|What breathing technique is NOT in Demon Slayer?
|Heavy Breathing

|-
|What is the Japanese name for Japan?
|Nippon

|-
|What is known as the equivalent of Disney in Japan?
|Studio Ghibli

|-
|Which of these brands of cars is Japanese?
|Subaru

|-
|What Hawaiian King is Goku's special move named after?
|Hawaiian King Kamehameha

|-
|In Japanese culture, what is a katana?
|A Sword

|-
|What is a sign of a holy site in Japan?
|Torii Gates

|-
|The city of Kobe has become known for the type of meat named after, but what animal does it come from?
|Cow

|-
|What blooms for only a few weeks a year?
|Cherry Blossoms

|-
|What dog species is native to Japan?
|Shiba Inu

|-
|What is a popular puzzle game invented in Japan?
|Sudoku

|-
|What is a luxurious beef dish in Japan?
|Wagyu

|-
|What is the official name of the Japanese Bullet Train?
|Shinkansen

|-
|What fish is poisonous that is still considered a delicacy?
|Puffer Fish

|-
|What is an iconic mountain in Japan?
|Mt. Fuji

|-
|What is Japan also known as?
|The Land of the Rising Sun

|-
|What is the old capital of Japan?
|Kyoto

|-
|Which of the following islands is NOT in Japan?
|Hawaii

|-
|Where can you feed deer openly?
|Nara

|-
|What is one of the most popular dishes in Japan?
|Sushi

|-
|What is the fastest way to travel domestically in Japan?
|Airplane

|-
|What is a top-selling Japanese gaming company?
|Nintendo

|-
|What shape is on the Japanese flag?
|Circle

|-
|In which city is the Temple of the Golden Pavilion (or Kinkaku-ji), one of Japan's biggest tourist attractions?
|Kyoto

|-
|What is the main social media in Japan?
|LINE

|-
|Which Titan is not in Attack on Titan?
|Cat Titan

|-
|What is the capital of Japan?
|Tokyo

|-
|What is Japan's largest grossing anime franchise?
|Pokemon

|-
|What is the currency of Japan?
|Yen

|-
|Which of these is not as commonly eaten by the Japanese?
|Steak

|-
|What is considered traditional clothing in Japan?
|Kimono

|-
|Tokyo International Airport is commonly known by what name?
|Haneda

|-
|Japan is bordered by which ocean?
|Pacific

|-
|In which season would you need to visit Japan to view the Cherry Blossoms?
|Spring

|-
|What is the Japanese name for rice balls?
|Onigiri

|}

[[Category:Guides]]
[[Category:Minigames]]
